Event: Space Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 01/07/2020
Sage Bot Item Code: A43


Other locations the gear can be found
Red Dragon
Mystic Dragon
Alien Keeper

Triggers: When taking fatal damage

The artifact wearer does not die. Instead, their max health is reduced by 33000 and they restore 60000 health. The artifact is triggered up to 3 times per battle. Once the artifact has been triggered for the last time, the fighter can be killed and their max health will return to its initial value.

Requirements: 90-100
